title: Check All tasks (or group of tasks) in Mirrored Columns
excerpt: When connecting items to be mirrored, we have to select each individual item. Ideally, we could select all or select all in a group.

posts.author: akjackson25 (Angela Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: When connecting items to be mirrored, we have to select each individual item. Ideally, we could select all or select all in a group.

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: Angela there is already a request for this so would recommend voting on that thread Mirror Column - Select Entire Board or Group - Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum
